note: Capture rows added by later hardware plans. Keep raw/HCI/decompile blobs in ignored .evidence/phase1 paths; commit sanitized manifest pointers only.

action: input_device_scan baseline with gun powered or pairable
expected_interpretation: Record whether the gun appears as an Android InputDevice; unavailable is an explicit outcome, not proof of no protocol.

action: ble_scan for fff0 service and fff1 fff3 fff5 characteristic candidates
origin: android-diagnostic BLE scan logcat plus optional HCI bugreport
expected_interpretation: Record visible BLE services/chars, permission denial, scan failure, or no candidate service honestly.

action: classic_scan for paired device UUIDs SPP and channel-1 socket candidates
origin: android-diagnostic Classic Bluetooth logcat plus optional HCI bugreport
expected_interpretation: Record bonded device, SPP/channel observations, socket bytes, timeout, permission denial, or unavailable state.

origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent MotionEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record trigger down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome; do not mark verified before normalized fixture linkage.

origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent MotionEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record reload down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome; long-hold recenter belongs to later Android host work.

action: joystick X/Y axes neutral min max and release
origin: android-diagnostic MotionEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record axis movement semantics or explicit no-axis/no-frame outcome.

origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record X button down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome.

origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record Y button down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome.

origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record A button down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome.

origin: android-diagnostic KeyEvent BLE Classic or app-observed frame logcat
expected_interpretation: Record B button down/up signal or explicit no-frame/no-event outcome.

action: bounded BLE fff5 rumble candidate attempt after input path evidence exists
origin: android-diagnostic rumble_attempt logcat plus optional HCI bugreport
expected_interpretation: Record observed physical motor activation, ack/fail, no-motor, permission denial, or unavailable state; failed attempts do not satisfy DISC-06.

action: bounded Classic SPP rumble candidate attempt after Classic input evidence exists
origin: android-diagnostic rumble_attempt logcat plus optional HCI bugreport
expected_interpretation: Record observed physical motor activation, ack/fail, no-motor, permission denial, or unavailable state; failed attempts do not satisfy DISC-06.
